contents: 看到切题的评论人工点赞～ 为什么大家一直在偏题去讨论健身有宜>< 原文后有一个很棒的评论和作者回复。“I think what’s most troubling for me is how, as a cultural ideal, the authentic self ultimately encourages a very atomized, inwards-looking kind of worldview, where individuals are encouraged to turn away from society as both the source of and solution to all manner of very real social and political problems, and instead holds up connecting with an authentic self (be this real or imagined), usually through consumption and usually through our bodies, as the ultimate achievement.” （不过大概国内年轻人并没有政治和社会议题的话语权。所以担忧点大家get不到）
